methods.method_name: Ice Core Sample Preparation and Analysis
methods.description: Process for decontaminating, melting, and preparing ice core samples for trace element analysis using ICP-SFMS.

steps.description: Decontamination of the MJ ice cores was carried out in a certified cold room ISO 5 with temperature below -20° C.
steps.searchable_summary: decontaminate ice cores in ISO 5 cold room

steps.description: The cores sections were melted using a continuous ice core melter system.
steps.searchable_summary: melt ice core sections using melter system

steps.description: Samples for trace elements analysis were collected into acid-cleaned LDPE vials and acidified to 1% with double-distilled HNO3.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and acidify samples for trace element analysis

steps.description: Concentrations of Bi, Cd, Cr, and Pb were determined by ICP-SFMS using a Thermo Electron Element 2.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze trace element concentrations using ICP-SFMS

steps.description: Samples of de-ionized water, or 'blanks', were prepared, treated, and analyzed using the same method applied to snow and ice samples.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and analyze blank samples for validation

steps.description: Concentrations below the MDL were removed, which occurred in a few cases (minor than 1%).
steps.searchable_summary: remove concentrations below method detection limits

methods.method_name: HYSPLIT Back-Trajectory Modeling and Cluster Analysis
methods.description: Simulation of air mass backward trajectories to explore sources of trace elements in aerosols and cluster analysis to identify airflow patterns.

steps.description: Air mass backward trajectories were simulated for 1000 m above ground level over the drilling site using the HYSPLIT model.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate air mass backward trajectories using HYSPLIT

steps.description: Ten-day (240 hr), 3D back-trajectories were simulated from the MJ site at 00:00 UTC daily from January 1948 to January 2015.
A cluster analysis was applied to a database of individual trajectories to obtain information about airflow patterns.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis on trajectory data
